data.title: Cryptocurrency Aave Decreases More Than 3% Within 24 hours
data.description: Over the past 24 hours, Aave's (CRYPTO: AAVE) price has fallen 3.17% to $151.92. This is opposite to its positive trend over the past week where it has experienced a 10.0% gain, moving from $138.29 to its current price.
